title: How Going First Changes Every Room a Godly Man Leads
caption:
Christ didn't lead from behind the group, and he didn't wait to be asked. He went first, every time, into the cost.

Apologize before you're asked to. Waiting for a confrontation isn't humility, it's just slower pride. Serve before you're thanked for it. Take the hit before you assign blame. Show up before you're needed.

"Whoever would be great among you must be your servant." — Matthew 20:26

Real leadership cost him his life for the people he led. Not a title he got to hold over them.

Save this and go first in one room this week.

#faith #christianleadership #godlymen #manofgod #matthew #scripture #leadership #christianmen
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
